events.title: Brian May turns 69
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May celebrates his 69th birthday

angles.name: rock royalty
angles.copy: Brian May, the iconic Queen guitarist, turns 69 today, a milestone birthday for one of rock's most enduring legends

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger celebrates his 83rd birthday

angles.name: rolling stones icon
angles.copy: Mick Jagger, the charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, turns 83 today, a testament to his enduring legacy in rock music

events.title: MTV Launch Anniversary
events.blurb: MTV launched on this day in 1981 with the Buggles' Video Killed The Radio Star as its first video

angles.name: music tv revolution
angles.copy: On this day in 1981, MTV revolutionized the music industry with its launch, starting with the iconic Buggles song Video Killed The Radio Star

events.title: Oasis Release Definitely Maybe
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album Definitely Maybe on this day in 1994

angles.name: oasis debut
angles.copy: Oasis' groundbreaking debut album Definitely Maybe was released on this day in 1994, marking the beginning of a new era in Britpop

events.title: Woodstock Festival Anniversary
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Festival took place on this day in 1969

angles.name: woodstock legacy
angles.copy: The legendary Woodstock Festival, a pivotal moment in music history, took place on this day in 1969, celebrating peace, love, and music

events.title: Elvis Presley Death Anniversary
events.blurb: Elvis Presley passed away on this day in 1977

angles.name: elvis tribute
angles.copy: We remember the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who left an indelible mark on music history, on the anniversary of his passing

events.title: Tupac Shakur Shot
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas on this day in 1996

angles.name: tupac legacy
angles.copy: Tupac Shakur, a powerful voice in hip-hop, was tragically shot in Las Vegas on this day in 1996, leaving behind a lasting impact on music and social justice

events.title: Jimi Hendrix Death Anniversary
events.blurb: Jimi Hendrix passed away on this day in 1970

angles.name: jimi hendrix tribute
angles.copy: We remember the groundbreaking guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 83 this year, on the anniversary of his passing, celebrating his enduring influence on rock music

events.title: The Beatles Release Abbey Road
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album Abbey Road on this day in 1969

angles.name: abbey road anniversary
angles.copy: The Beatles' seminal album Abbey Road, released on this day in 1969, continues to inspire generations with its timeless music and iconic cover

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' lead singer Chrissie Hynde celebrates her 75th birthday

angles.name: chrissie hynde birthday
angles.copy: Chrissie Hynde, the influential lead singer of The Pretenders, turns 75 today, marking a milestone birthday for a rock legend

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis' iconic frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday

angles.name: liam gallagher birthday
angles.copy: Liam Gallagher, the charismatic frontman of Oasis, turns 54 today, a birthday tribute to a rock legend

events.title: John Lennon Releases Imagine
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic album Imagine on this day in 1971

angles.name: imagine anniversary
angles.copy: John Lennon's powerful and poignant album Imagine, released on this day in 1971, continues to inspire generations with its timeless message of peace and unity

events.title: Apple Releases the First iPod
events.blurb: Apple released the first iPod on this day in 2001

angles.name: ipod anniversary
angles.copy: The first iPod, released by Apple on this day in 2001, revolutionized the way we listen to music, marking a significant milestone in tech history

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: James Bond Day is celebrated on this day

angles.name: james bond day
angles.copy: James Bond Day is here, a celebration of the iconic spy who has captivated audiences for decades with his sophistication, style, and high-stakes adventures

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: John Lennon, the legendary musician and songwriter, was born on this day in 1940

angles.name: john lennon tribute
angles.copy: We remember John Lennon, the visionary musician and songwriter, on what would have been his 86th birthday, celebrating his enduring legacy in music and peace activism

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary comedian and actor John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday

angles.name: john cleese birthday
angles.copy: John Cleese, the beloved comedian and actor, turns 87 today, a milestone birthday for a British comedy legend
